title: Result - Chile
content:
Welcome to Chile, a land of over 4,000 kilometres of coastline and incredible diversity! From scuba diving and surfing to skiing and sandboarding, Chile offers endless adventure.
Explore Torres del Paine, the Atacama Desert, Patagonia, or Easter Island. A top destination for young travellers, Chile welcomes thousands of international students yearly and boasts excellent universities. Enjoy vibrant nightlife, outdoor activities, rich history, fine cuisine, wine tours and so much more!

## Unique food tradition
Pastel de choclo: a savoury corn pie with a filling called pino, a mixture of ground beef with onions, paprika, cumin and other spices. Traditionally, enriched with poached chicken, hard-boiled eggs, black olives and occasionally raisins.
The normal workweek is up to 45 hours, spread over 5 or 6 consecutive days.

### Local legend or myth
Alicanto: a large, magical bird that lives among the hills of the Atacama Desert and feeds on gold and silver.

### Language of the Land
The official language in Chile is Spanish.
kilometres is the length of Chile from north to south, making it the longest country in the world—about the same width as the United States.
Fiesta de la Vendimia (Grape Harvest Festival)
Ready to make your plans to work and travel abroad? Take the first step by learning more about your selected country and choose the work permit that's right for you.
